mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rider WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY balance DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rider (account, password, name, phone, student_id, status) VALUES (#{account}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{studentId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE rider SET balance = 0.00 WHERE rider_id = #{riderId} AND balance > 0
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM rider WHERE rider_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select balance from rider where rider_id = #{riderId}
